degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial payload schema review requested mapping span status to Datadog metadata key status rather than obs.status.
Initial events/redaction review requested mapping redaction records to metadata.redaction.records and enforcing a JSON-safe scalar payload boundary.
Updated payload mapping to use status metadata, metadata.redaction.records, and scalar-only span/event attribute copying.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
